title: Denfurlong Farm & Chipping Sodbury (Amigos)

main_route.normalized_name: Denfurlong Farm Campsite, Chedworth, Gloucestershire, UK
main_route.excerpt: We're in Denfurlong Farm Campsite. The sun is shining & it's a bit warmer. lovely empty site. Silence! Rabbits. Birds.

excursions.label: Day trip to Chipping Sodbury and lunch at Amigos

stops.excerpt: We are about to leave for Chipping Sodbury. We wander in the town & do a bit of shopping.
we have a delicious lunch at Amigos, Shamsi & Dave's restaurant, which they don't let us pay for. Jill visits too.

boundary_flags.issue: June 3rd entry on same page (B_0346_L) appears to be a separate trip: 'Simon, Eve & Tinder left at 10.45 & picked up Flora. We stopped for lunch at Kimbolton, a church in the middle of nowhere.' This entry is not part of the May 26th Denfurlong/Chipping Sodbury trip and likely belongs to the next trip in volume B.

summary: Simon and Eve spent a night at Denfurlong Farm Campsite in Gloucestershire on 26 May 2021, enjoying the quiet site before driving to Chipping Sodbury for a town wander and a free lunch at Amigos, the restaurant run by their friends Shamsi and Dave. They returned home to Birmingham the same day.
extraction_notes: Only Simon and Eve are mentioned in the May 26th entry (the new van is referenced, consistent with 2020-21 entries). The diary page also contains a June 3rd entry (Simon, Eve & Tinder picking up Flora and stopping at Kimbolton church) which is a separate trip/event and has been flagged in boundary_flags rather than included here. Denfurlong Farm Campsite is near Chedworth, Gloucestershire (between Cheltenham and Cirencester); Chipping Sodbury is in South Gloucestershire east of Bristol. No crossings; entirely within England.
